title: Bump github.com/containers/storage from 1.38.2 to 1.39.0
body:
Bumps [github.com/containers/storage](https://github.com/containers/storage) from 1.38.2 to 1.39.0.
Release notes

Sourced from github.com/containers/storage's releases.

v1.39.0

What's Changed

  • Bump to v1.38.2 by @​rhatdan in containers/storage#1124
  • build(deps): bump github.com/moby/sys/mountinfo from 0.5.0 to 0.6.0 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1126
  • containers: detect overlapping mappings by @​giuseppe in containers/storage#1128
  • fix types.Save() by @​cdoern in containers/storage#1130
  • Ensure overlay.Driver.recreateSymlinks does not loop endlessly by @​mtrmac in containers/storage#1132
  • chunked: fix read layer cache by @​giuseppe in containers/storage#1134
  • RFC: Mark layers for deletion before actually doing so by @​mtrmac in containers/storage#1133
  • Document that duplicate links are a possibility by @​mtrmac in containers/storage#1137
  • Improve handling of failures to delete a WIP layer by @​mtrmac in containers/storage#1138
  • build(deps): bump github.com/klauspost/compress from 1.14.2 to 1.14.3 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1141
  • build(deps): bump github.com/Microsoft/go-winio from 0.5.1 to 0.5.2 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1142
  • drivers, chown: support chown of hard links by @​giuseppe in containers/storage#1144
  • Fix a pasto from #1138 by @​mtrmac in containers/storage#1149
  • build(deps): bump github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/estargz from 0.11.0 to 0.11.1 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1150
  • Remove dead code by @​mtrmac in containers/storage#1146
  • Fix error handling of a failure to create an image by @​mtrmac in containers/storage#1151
  • RFC: Warn if we are deleting an incomplete layer by @​mtrmac in containers/storage#1145
  • insufficient IDs errors: mention podman-system-migrate by @​vrothberg in containers/storage#1155
  • build(deps): bump github.com/klauspost/compress from 1.14.3 to 1.14.4 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1154
  • Preserve extra overlayfs mount options when loading many-layered images by @​kousu in containers/storage#1156
  • overlay: mountFrom read-only mounts using relative paths by @​nalind in containers/storage#1157
  • race, storage: add independent AddNames and RemoveNames for images,layers and containers by @​flouthoc in containers/storage#1153
  • overlay: Account for the trailing '\0' in mount() string. by @​kousu in containers/storage#1158
  • build(deps): bump github.com/klauspost/compress from 1.14.4 to 1.15.0 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1160
  • build(deps): bump github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/estargz from 0.11.1 to 0.11.2 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1161
  • ExecRunnable: prevent logging on stderr when its not expected by @​flouthoc in containers/storage#1162
  • build(deps): bump github.com/klauspost/compress from 1.15.0 to 1.15.1 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1164
  • build(deps): bump github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/estargz from 0.11.2 to 0.11.3 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1166
  • build(deps): bump github.com/stretchr/testify from 1.7.0 to 1.7.1 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1167
  • Move the mount_program autodetection into the graphdriver Init() by @​dcermak in containers/storage#1165
  • MaybeReexecUsingUserNamespace: handle SIGHUP/SIGINT/SIGTERM by @​nalind in containers/storage#1170

New Contributors

  • @​kousu made their first contribution in containers/storage#1156

Full Changelog: https://github.com/containers/storage/compare/v1.38.2...v1.39.0

v1.38.3

[v1.38, backport] store: add independent `AddNames` and `RemoveNames` for images,layers,containers
Commits
  • 6345f74 Bump to v1.39.0
  • 03b1581 Merge pull request #1170 from nalind/forward-signals
  • 178c70e MaybeReexecUsingUserNamespace: handle SIGHUP/SIGINT/SIGTERM
  • 8e56539 Merge pull request #1165 from dcermak/fix-mount_program-autodetection
  • 39de90b Move the mount_program autodetection into the graphdriver Init()
  • 46a6381 Merge pull request #1167 from containers/dependabot/go_modules/github.com/str...
  • 68c03e2 build(deps): bump github.com/stretchr/testify from 1.7.0 to 1.7.1
  • 83a1617 Merge pull request #1166 from containers/dependabot/go_modules/github.com/con...
  • 5790aa1 build(deps): bump github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/estargz
  • 845808c Merge pull request #1164 from containers/dependabot/go_modules/github.com/kla...
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view
